# Org Context Map
# This file lists the repos this org coordinates and their .claude/ entry points.
# Update when repos are added or removed from the org.
#
# Scope: org-level. Per-project equivalent: [project]/.claude/llms.txt (if present)
# Source: generated by step-11-org-scaffold
# See: D80-org-coordination.md for full specification

## Org Coordination (this repo)
[ORG_REPO_PATH]: shared coordination hub — org backlog, validated facts, cross-project commands

## Projects
# Format: [REPO_NAME]: [path or URL] — [one-line description]
# Add entries as repos join the org. Remove entries when repos leave.
[REPO_NAME_1]: [path or URL] — [one-line description of this project's scope]

## Shared Reference
reference/validated-facts-org.md: org-validated facts (services, infra constants, API baselines)
reference/org-coordination-guide.md: day-to-day operational guide for this repo

## Commands
commands/health-check.md: org-scope health check (read-only)
commands/intake.md: inbound task triage and routing
